viral_overseas.text: Built an AI content pipeline that generates $8k/month in passive income. Started with $0, just GPT-4 API + basic Python skills. The secret? Finding micro-niches where AI actually solves real problems. Thread below 🧵

viral_overseas.text: AI agents are replacing entire marketing teams at small businesses. I've consulted 50+ companies in Q1 2026. Average cost reduction: 70%. Average output increase: 300%. The automation revolution is here.

viral_overseas.text: Made $25k last month selling AI-generated educational courses on Udemy. No filming, no editing. Just Claude 3.5 + text-to-speech + Canva automation. Market validation took 2 days. Scaling took 2 weeks.

viral_overseas.text: Running 15 AI-powered micro SaaS products simultaneously. Total revenue: $47k/month. Team size: just me + AI assistants. The future of entrepreneurship isn't about more people, it's about better AI workflows.
viral_overseas.ja_summary: 15個の AI 搭載マイクロ SaaS を同時運営。総収益月47,000ドル。チーム規模は自分 + AI アシスタントのみ。起業の未来は人数ではなく、優れた AI ワークフロー

viral_overseas.text: AI voiceover business hit $12k MRR in 90 days. Target: audiobook publishers who need multiple character voices. One human trains the model, AI generates infinite variations. Clients save 80% on voice talent costs.
